name: Application Modernization
description: Application assessment, re-architecture, and modernization services to transform legacy monolithic applications into cloud-native architectures. Includes microservices decomposition, API-first design, DevOps enablement, and managed application operations post-transformation.
positioning: Takes customers beyond lift-and-shift into genuine modernization. Bridges the gap between cloud migration (infrastructure) and business value realization (applications).
competitive_moat: End-to-end capability from assessment through managed operations, container platform integration
